title: Tough weekend for Garden Route Badgers Colts
description: CRICKET NEWS - It was a tough weekend for...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - It was a tough weekend for the Garden Route Badgers Colts team in the Cricket SA provincial colts' competition.

The Badgers, who were in action at the Recreation Ground, suffered defeats in both the three-day and one-day matches.

In the three-day match, Western Province convincingly won by an innings and 44 runs, and in the one-day match, the visitors from Cape Town won by 51 runs.


> In the three-day match, The Badgers, who were in action at the Recreation Ground, suffered defeats in both the three-day and one-day matches. convincingly won by an innings and 44 runs, and in the one-day match, the visitors from Cape Town won by 51 runs.


Three-day match:

Garden Route Badgers: 1st innings 120 all out (Heath Richards 48, Jade Richter 38, Sheena Guy 3/12, Jody Lawrence 2/22, Liyema Waqu 2/38, Abdullah Bayoumy 2/16); and 2nd innings 210 all out (Jade Richter 52, Pheko Moletsane 38, Jonathan Bester 34, Jody Lawrence 4/35, Sheena Guy 2/63, Cameron Fraser 2/43).

Western Province: 1st innings 374/9 (Juan James 80, Sheena Guy 73, Cameron Fraser 72, Jade Richter 3/103, Sintu Majiza 3/85).

Western Province won by an innings and 44 runs.

One-day match:

Western Province: 262/7 (Kashief Joseph 97, Sheena Guy 64*, Cameron Fraser 29, Elih Thorne 3/24).

Garden Route Badgers: 211 all out (Pheko Moletsane 80, Jonathan Bester 60, Heath Richards 30, Daniel Cook 4/7, Cameron Fraser 3/48.)

Western Province won by 51 runs.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
